name: Rupert Resources Ltd.
description: Rupert Resources Ltd. is a Canadian-based gold exploration and development company focused on its Rupert Lapland Project in Northern Finland. The company's flagship asset is the Ikkari discovery, a high-grade, long-life gold deposit, alongside the Pahtavaara gold mine and mill. Rupert Resources is committed to responsible development and sustainable mining practices. The company is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: RUP) and has recently entered into an agreement to be acquired by Agnico Eagle Mines Limited, reflecting the significant value and potential of its high-margin assets in a Tier 1 jurisdiction.
